## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Log in as role '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include any console/network errors if available.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Browser & version:
- OS:
- Role logged in as (if relevant):

- Backend version (if known):

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
